title: KOOLTAIL Dog Collar and Lead Set for Small Dogs with Bowtie and Bells - Puppy Collar and Lead Sets with Classic Plaid Matching Pattern, Soft Leather Tangle Free Leashes for Small Dogs Cats Boy Girl
features: PUPPY COLLAR & LEASH SET: Size XS (Neck Girth: 8–10”); Size S (Neck Girth: 9–11”). Leash length: 59” (approx. 4.9ft / 150cm) – slight measurement variance (up to 0.5”) may occur. Refer to the size chart and measure your pet’s neck girth prior to ordering.

COMFORTABLE & DURABLE: Crafted with polyester plaid fabric, both the collars and leash feature a soft PU leather lining. The material is gentle on your pet’s skin (100% skin-friendly!) – soft, comfortable to wear, and highly durable for daily use. No more resistance from your pet to collars!

3-PIECE COMPLETE SET: Includes two unique collars (a bowtie collar and an irregular bandana collar) plus one matching leash – everything you need for walks, outings, or special occasions. Perfect for small to medium dogs and cats.

CLASSIC & FASHIONABLE DESIGN: Timeless beige plaid never goes out of style! The bowtie collar gives your pet a gentle, polished look, while the irregular bandana collar adds a cute, casual touch. Ideal for formal events, holidays, birthdays, family gatherings, photo shoots, and everyday wear alike.

DETACHABLE BELL: A small gold bell is attached to the D-ring of each collar, emitting a gentle, crisp jingle when your pet moves. The bell is easily removable – add it on or take it off based on your preference!
description: Introducing the KOOLTAIL Dog Collar and Leash Set Bandana - the perfect accessory for your furry friend! Whether you have a male or female dog, this set is suitable for all small to medium-sized dogs. You can choose from a variety of colors, including a cute pink dog collar for your little girl pup! Made with high-quality materials, this small dog collar and leash set is both durable and comfortable. It features a personalized dog collar that you can customize with your dog's name or any text of your choice. This ensures that your dog stands out from the crowd and adds a touch of uniqueness to their style! The KOOLTAIL dog accessories boy set also comes with a stylish bandana and dog bow tie that complement your dog's collar and add an extra layer of cuteness to their look. The XS dog collar is suitable for dogs with a neck size between 7.5-10.5 inches, making it perfect for small dogs such as Chihuahuas, Yorkies, and Shih Tzus. With this puppy leash and collar, you no longer have to worry about buying a separate leash. The leash and collar are designed to work together, ensuring that your dog stays safe and secure during walks and training sessions. The small dog collar and leash set is also adjustable, which means that it can grow with your puppy and last throughout their life. In conclusion, the KOOLTAIL Dog Collar and Leash Set Bandana is the perfect accessory for your furry best friend. It is functional, stylish, and comfortable, making it perfect for daily use. Plus, with its customizable collar, bandana, and bow tie, your dog is sure to turn heads and receive compliments from everyone they meet!
